codeReview.summary: The worker successfully completed the spoofed header resistance feature. It strips 6 identity headers (X-Authenticated-User, X-User-Id, etc.) in the proxy director for the bootstrap endpoint, preventing client spoofing. The websocket handler dials with a fresh header, inherently preventing spoofing. Extensive test cases cover multiple users reaching the same sandbox with different contexts, and explicitly test stripping of various spoofed headers.

summary: Passed review. Properly strips client identity headers and injects JWT-verified context for both HTTP and WS paths. Comprehensive tests included.
